DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: JOAN M. GRIMES, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, WELLS FARGO BANK. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE UNDERTAKING IS SET IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,608.78. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGINTY, MICHAEL $21,891.22 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $477.42 INTEREST, $508.39 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,677.03, 1. WELLS FARGO BANK IS THE LIENHOLDER ON THE 2003 BMW 325I; 2. TRANSFER OF LEGAL TITLE TO THE VEHICLE SHALL BE MADE TO PLTF. BY DMV; 3. IN THE EVENT PLTF. REPOSSESS THE VEHICLE AND SOLD IT, THE PROCEEDS FROM THE SALE SHALL BE APPLIED TO THE BALANCE DUE AND OWING ON THE JUDGMENT, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-03-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
